framework.name: WIMSE architecture complements but doesn't solve delegation
framework.description: The draft positions itself explicitly as the delegation layer that WIMSE's identity layer lacks. WIMSE provides workload identity propagation; AATs provide attenuation. This confirms gap_3 intuition — identity propagation and delegation authorization are separate problems.
framework.raw_quote: complementing WIMSE's identity layer with a delegation and attenuation layer

source.title: Attenuating Authorization Tokens for Agentic Delegation Chains
